mapper.select: SELECT id, title, image_path, link_url, status, start_date, end_date, priority, created_at, updated_at FROM notice WHERE status='Y' AND NOW() BETWEEN start_date AND end_date ORDER BY priority DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice (title, image_path, link_url, status, start_date, end_date, priority, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{imagePath}, #{linkUrl}, 'Y', #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{priority}, NOW(), NOW())
